name: Winter Vegetable Pure w/ Sweet Spices & Crispy Shallots
recipeIngredient: 1 small butternut squash, peeled, seeded, and diced
2 small acorn squashes, peeled, seeded, and diced
1/2 cup heavy cream or 2 tablespoons butter (optional)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large pot, melt the butter over medium heat.
2. Add the diced onion and sauté until translucent, about 5 minutes.
3. Stir in the garlic and cook for another minute.
4. Add the butternut squash, acorn squashes, turnips, and carrots to the pot.
5. Pour in the chicken stock and add the thyme, bay leaf, cinnamon, nutmeg, ginger, cayenne pepper, and allspice.
6. Bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce the heat and simmer for 20-25 minutes or until the vegetables are tender.
7. Remove the bay leaf and season with salt and black pepper to taste.
8. If desired, stir in the lemon juice and heavy cream (or additional butter) before serving.
9. Serve hot and enjoy your crispy shallots on top.
